heading: Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 97–164, title I, § 14096 Stat. 44Apr. 2, 1982
label: 2601 to 2604 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 97–164, title I, § 14096 Stat. 44Apr. 2, 1982
notes: Section 2601, acts , ; , , ; , –(d), title V, § 501(27), (28), , provided for appeals to the Court of Customs and Patent Appeals from final judgments or orders of the Court of International Trade and for the procedures to be followed in such appeals. See .June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 979Pub. L. 91–271, title I, § 10384 Stat. 275Pub. L. 96–417, title IV, § 403(a)94 Stat. 1740–1742section 1295(a)(5) of this titleJune 2, 1970Oct. 10, 1980

Section 2602, acts , ; , , ; , , ; , , , provided for the precedence of enumerated civil actions in the Court of Customs and Patent Appeals. See .June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 980Pub. L. 89–651, § 8(c)(3)80 Stat. 902Pub. L. 91–271, title I, § 10484 Stat. 276Pub. L. 96–417, title IV, § 403(e)(1)94 Stat. 1741section 1296 of this titleOct. 14, 1966June 2, 1970Oct. 10, 1980

Section 2603, added , , , provided that, except as provided in section 2639 or 2641(b) of this title or in the rules prescribed by the court, the Federal Rules of Evidence would apply in the Court of Customs and Patent Appeals in any appeal from the Court of International Trade.Pub. L. 96–417, title IV, § 404(a)94 Stat. 1741Oct. 10, 1980

Section 2604, added , , , authorized the chief judge of the Court of Customs and Patent Appeals to summon annually the judges of the court to a judicial conference for the purpose of considering the business of the court and improvements in the administration of justice of the court.Pub. L. 96–417, title IV, § 405(a)94 Stat. 1741Oct. 10, 1980
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1982 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1982section 402 of Pub. L. 97–164section 171 of this title
